news.t: Here's why small caps are beating the S&P 500 this quarter

holdings.infoBox: PSCH is an equity ETF with a total of 81 individual holdings. The top holdings are Molina Healthcare stock at 5.14%, BrightSpring Health Services at 4.67%, Krystal Biotech at 4.16%, Corcept Therapeutics at 3.91%, and Glaukos at 3.65%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P SmallCap Health Care ETF (PSCH) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P SmallCap 600 Capped Health Care index, a market-cap-weighted index of small-cap health care companies taken from the S&P SmallCap 600 Index. PSCH was launched on Apr 7, 2010 and is issued by Invesco.
infoTable: S&P SmallCap 600 Capped Health Care Index

data.title: Here's why small caps are beating the S&P 500 this quarter
data.text: Small caps are joining in on the market rally. The Russell 2000 has bounced 56% since the March bottom, outpacing the S&P 500's 46% run over the same stretch.
